top_grounded.claim: Many subquadratic-time architectures such as linear attention, gated convolution and recurrent models, and structured state space models (SSMs) have been developed to address Transformers' computational inefficiency on long sequences, but they have not performed as well as attention on important modalities such as language.

next_actions: Pick 1 concrete intervention and convert it into a falsifiable claim (inputs → mechanism → measurable outputs).
Run targeted retrieval using 3–5 specific transformer-efficiency keywords and compare results.
